text.title: Design Tokens Fundamentals Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: author-primitives
step.action: Define raw values in primitive tier.

step.name: author-semantic
step.action: Name intent tokens (color.text.primary, motion.fast); reference primitives.

step.name: compute-a11y
step.action: Compute contrast_ratio for text tokens; attach reduced_motion_variant; mark logical/physical spacing.

step.name: publish-canonical
step.action: Validate DTCG; commit; downstream distribution methodology emits per-platform.
